## Taiwan Semiconductor Shares Slip Approximately 1.4%; No Specific Catalyst Cited

A modest sympathy decline in TSM with no fundamental trigger is sector noise on a down tape; the more relevant near-term read for TSM remains any demand-mix signal flowing from INTC's earnings call regarding fab utilization.

- TSM shares declined approximately 1.4% according to the headline.
- No company-specific catalyst was identified; the move likely reflects broad semiconductor sector pressure.
